query: Hades II latest patch hotfix notes Medea Suffering on Sight Hermes Tall Order Artemis Crossroads Cauldron site:supergiantgames.com OR site:store.steampowered.com

mako.raw:
{"query":"Hades II latest patch hotfix notes Medea Suffering on Sight Hermes Tall Order Artemis Crossroads Cauldron site:supergiantgames.com OR site:store.steampowered.com","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1846,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://patchbot.io/games/hades-ii","title":"Patch Notes for Hades II","content":"Fixed cases where you could get more than one of the same Boon of Hades after equipping Jeweled Pom (Hades & Persephone)
Fixed cases where you could miss rewards from effects such as Quick Buck (Hermes)
Fixed rewards appearing out of bounds during Dream Dives in the chamber before the final battle on The Summit if you happened to activate Gold Gold Gold (Echo)
We're very grateful for all your support of Hades II since our v1.0 launch last fall, and all through our Early Access development before then!
With that in mind, we're pleased to present our second Post-Launch Patch, which includes some bonus content and quality-of-life improvements we've been working on."},{"url":"https://nintendoeverything.com/hades-2-hotfix-4-update-announced-patch-notes/","title":"Hades 2 hotfix 4 update announced, patch notes","content":"Like previous patches, it will be available soon on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch.
Supergiant Games is addressing another round of fixes here.
You can find the full rundown below, but note that some players may consider a couple of the details spoiler-related.
Hades 2 hotfix 4 update patch notes
Hades 2 can be played on both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch now."},{"url":"https://hades2.wiki.fextralife.com/Patch+Notes","title":"All Patch Notes on Hades 2 Complete List | Hades 2 Wiki","content":"Fixed foes in Thessaly sometimes starting to attack too soon if you had Corrosion on Sight (Medea)
Fixed Vampiric Cataclysm (Staff) not being improved by Old Herbal Remedy (Circe)
Crossroads Renewal: Many decorative items have reduced costs in Kudos compared to before.
Any excess Kudos you have already spent will be refunded.
The v1.0 Launch of Hades II has finally arrived!
Increased Fear requirement for claiming rewards from Bounties of the Infinite Abyss (Cauldron)
Fixed Sinister Pinion (Daedalus) not applying its bonus to Sister Blades (Morrigan)
Fixed interaction between Howling Soul (Hades) and Anvil Ring (Hephaestus) or Arctic Ring (Demeter)
Fixed an issue causing the Rush Boon bonus from Umbral Flames (Supay) to affect indirect Boons such as Beach Ball (Poseidon x Apollo)
Paid Dues (Hermes): new Legendary!
Improved blast sound for Beach Ball (Poseidon x Apollo)
Fixed visual shield from The Lovers (Arcana) not appearing while using Sister Blades (Artemis)
Fixed Air Quality (Zeus) not affecting Suffering on Sight (Medea)
Fixed Rarify not working on Quick Buck (Hermes)
Storm Ring (Zeus): now deals damage from all Casts (not just Omega Cast)
Minor adjustments to the order in which Olympians may first appear early on.
You can now Dash out of many attack recovery animations more reliably.
Related, if this already occurred, look for a one-time bonus in the Crossroads while Eris is present."}]}

Staff)** disabling your Attacks in certain cases. • Fixed high-cost **Boons of Hermes** found in shops not always having improved Rarity. • Fixed projectiles from **Charybdis** not splitting as expected after striking certain obstacles. • Fixed cases in which **Jetty** could get stuck while resurfacing. • Fixed several cases where Melinoë could end up out of bounds in a Location. • Fixed an issue where a slowdown effect could persist unexpectedly after **Gale** blocks an attack. • Fixed visual issues with Demeter's Freeze interacting with other visual effects. • Fixed visual issues with Infernal Troves. • Fixed incorrect text sometimes appearing on the Victory Screen. • Fixed incorrect Gold preview when Nemesis wants to trade for **Quick Buck (Hermes)**. • Fixed cases where music could stop playing unexpectedly. • Fixed cases where the Past Deeds screen would not show the foe that put an end to your night. • Fixed cases where Odysseus and Dora could appear too close together in the taverna. • Fixed certain visual effects persisting during the Melinoë's Return to Shadow escapes. • Fixed a visual issue where text formatting would not reset after resetting the Oath of the Unseen. • Fixed Play Screen showing your location as The Crossroads despite just having left for the night.","score":0.69049704,"raw_content":null,"domain":"steampowered.com","popularity_score":0.3448404862917294,"main_topic":"entertainment"},{"url":"https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/1145350?l=koreana&updates=true&emclan=103582791472836561&emgid=521992119019110974","title":"Hades II - Post-Launch Patch 1 Preview & Notes 일반 업데이트 2025년 10월 23일 From all of us at Supergiant Games, thank you for playing Hades II. v1.0 Launch Update - Patch Notes 일반 업데이트 2025년 9월 25일 The v1.0 Launch of Hades II has finally arrived! • Various other minor fixes and adjustments. • Various minor fixes and improvements to several Locations. • Various other minor graphical fixes and improvements. • Other minor additions, fixes, changes, and improvements. • Other minor fixes and improvements. • Updates and fixes to translations in all languages. • Fixed controller vibration not working while. • Fixed a rare case where you could avoid finding **Hades** on the path to the True Ending. • Fixed visual issue where Melinoë could get stuck in the Special animation for the **Moonstone Axe**. • Fixed **Lunar Ray (Selene)** ending unexpectedly if **Athena** happened to arrive. • Fixed additional cases where you could end up out of bounds after using **Wolf Howl (Selene)**. • Fixed interaction between **Arctic Ring (Demeter)** and **Hostile Environment (Demeter x Ares)**. • Fixed cases where you could unexpectedly accept the same Boon twice. • Fixed cases where you could unexpectedly interact with **Athena** twice as she arrived. • Fixed several Keepsakes not having added feedback when their effects have expired and can be replaced. • Fixed cases where Boons of **Ares** could be offered before you properly met. • Fixed a case where the **Crossroads Renewal Project** would not become available when expected. • Fixed Location Rewards unexpectedly appearing in the Crossroads after a failed Encounter with **Nemesis**. • Fixed various voice lines not playing as expected. Hades II Earns 'Best Game on Steam Deck' Award! Thank you everyone who helped nominate **Hades II** in the category of **Best Game on Steam Deck** in this year's Steam Awards!","score":0.67192334,"raw_content":null,"domain":"steampowered.com","popularity_score":0.3448404862917294,"main_topic":"entertainment"},{"url":"https://www.supergiantgames.com/blog/hades-big-bad-update-patch-notes","title":"Hades: The Big Bad Update Patch Notes | Supergiant Games","content":"Title: Hades: The Big Bad Update Patch Notes | Supergiant Games

• **Eternal Spear**: reduced damage of Spin Attack *(rolling back yesterday's change, which introduced new issues)*. • **Massive Spin (Spear)**: reduced damage *(it is still greater than before the last change)*. • Fixed an issue where the effect of **Empowering Nova (Daedalus - Blade)** did not expire consistently. • Fixed an issue where **Doom** visual effects could linger onscreen during the boss-defeated presentation. • **Eternal Spear**: increased damage of Spin Attack. • **Thunder Flourish (Zeus)**: reduced damage. • **Slicing Shot (Ares)**: reduced damage at higher rarity levels. • **Black Metal (Ares)**: reduced effectiveness at higher rarity levels. • **Hunting Blades (Artemis • Ares)**: reduced effectiveness. • **Minotaur Rush (Shield)**: increased damage of Power Shot. • **Massive Spin (Spear)**: increased damage. • Updated some color variants for god-specific damage numbers. • Fixed Boon icon for **Relative Speed (Hermes)**. • Fixed **Battle Rage (Ares)** visual effect being visible during the boss-defeated presentation; and persisting after encounters are complete. • Fixed an issue where some **Hermes** Boon effects could carry over into the **House of Hades**. 📢 Enhanced **Poms of Power** found in **Erebus** now increase Boon level •2 *(rather than changing rarity)*. • **Static Discharge (Zeus)**: increased **Jolted** effect damage. • **Last Stand (Athena)**: reduced healing effect. • **Quick Reload (Artemis)**: reduced effect. • **Black Metal (Ares)**: reduced area-of-effect bonus. • **War-God's Thirst (Ares)**: reduced damage. • **Black Out (Dionysus)**: increased damage. • **Wine-God's Stupor (Dionysus)**: increased damage. • **Explosive Return (Shield)**: reduced damage. • **Vicious Torment**: now also increases damage from inferno-bombs from **Caustic (Chaos)** effects. • Other minor fixes and improvements to various chambers. • Updated attack animations for **Heart-Seeking Bow**; updated visual effects for its Power Shot. • Updated some **Bone Hydra** effects and animations. • Updated some **Exalted** visual effects and animations. • Updated visual effects for Ares' **Doom** hitting foes. • Updated sound from taking lava damage. • Fixed an issue where **True Shot (Artemis)** could not deal backstab damage. • Fixed issues with some weapons not applying knock-away effects consistently. • Fixed an issue where **Bone Hourglass** could apply to some effects unexpectedly. • Fixed issues where some sound effects could loop indefinitely after encounters.","score":0.6506676,"raw_content":null,"domain":"supergiantgames.com","popularity_score":2.763620052257021,"main_topic":"entertainment"},{"url":"https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/1145350/view/529877854094098947?l=czech","title":"Hades II – Post-Launch Patch 2 - Hotfix 2 – novinky","content":"Title: Hades II – Post-Launch Patch 2 - Hotfix 2 – novinky
